phase.description: The current phase of the build.

message.description: Human-readable message about the build status.

reason.description: Brief machine-readable reason for the build status.

startTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the build started running.

duration.description: Duration of the build in nanoseconds.

outputDockerImageReference.description: The Docker image reference of the built image.

logSnippet.description: The last few lines of the build log for failed builds.
